name: gui-starter
description: Optional root scripts to run both apps at once. Each app can also be run on its own — see frontend/README.md and backend/README.md.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
